beIN SPORTS 5.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Sunderland - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
beIN SPORTS 5.desc: Wolves are unbeaten in their last seven home league games against Sunderland. This is the first time they’ve hosted them since a 0-0 draw in the Championship in December 2017, and first time in the Premier League since December 2011. Sunderland have won their last two league games against Wolves. They’re looking to complete the double over them for the first time since 1949-50, while they last won three in a row against them in March 1937.
